ab: ti Kuliu a u kaqaliyan, aljak nua sePaiwan uta timadju.
ch: 我的好朋友叫Kuliu，他也是排灣族的小孩。
en: My good friend’s name is Kuliu, and he is also an Paiwan child.

ab: maciyuciyur amen a kitulu i Tjaqaciljay a qinaljan.
en: We study together in the Tjaqaciljay tribe.

ab: ru kilangda men tua vuluvulung a menilimilingan, macaqu amen aravac a penaiwanan.
ch: 我們常常一起聽耆老說故事，我們都很會說排灣語。
en: We often listen to the elders telling stories together, and we both can speak the Paiwan proficiently.

ab: qaca tu kural aen, kedri tu mariljay ti Kuliu.
ch: 我很高也很胖，Kuliu很矮也很瘦。
en: I am tall and overweight, while Kuliu is short and thin.

ab: tarivak aravac ti Kuliu, tjenglay amen a mapuljat taymadju.
ch: Kuliu很有活力，大家都很喜歡他。
en: Kuliu is very energetic, and everyone likes him a lot.
